purpose: Provenance sidecar (FUP-238): the v2 artifact predates the schema-v3 harness_digest field, so its producing harness is recorded here. Deterministic metadata about an unchanged measurement — the artifact itself is immutable and was not touched.
digest_recipe: harness_source_digest() in tests/eval/exemplar_baseline.py: sha256 over exemplar_baseline.py then test_exemplar_baseline.py, each hashed as filename + NUL + file bytes + NUL. Reproducible from git blobs: `git show <commit>:tests/eval/<name>`.

verified.harness_committed: a201dd5 (pre-rebase) at 2026-07-15T11:07:47-04:00; rebased onto main as 751e596
verified.artifact_committed: 53bc90c (pre-rebase) at 2026-07-15T11:31:55-04:00; rebased onto main as ee963af
verified.byte_identity: git diff a201dd5..2b100d9 over both harness files is empty, and git diff 53bc90c..2b100d9 over analyze-v10.json is empty (verified 2026-07-15) — so the digest above, computed over 2b100d9's harness blobs, is the digest of the code that produced the freeze. The schema-v3 harness change (90a24d4, the commit after 2b100d9) postdates the freeze and necessarily digests differently.
